cases.label: lossy
cases.description: A generic summary drops the ordered key-rotation and rollback procedure.

sources.body: Pause publishers before rotating the signing credential. Create the replacement, update the canary alias, verify one signed canary artifact, and then resume publishers.
If canary verification fails, restore the previous alias before resuming publishers.

calibrationCandidate.body: Signing credentials should be rotated regularly. Use a canary and follow the standard recovery process if validation reports a problem.

requiredClaims.pattern: pause publishers before rotating the signing credential
restore the previous alias before resuming publishers

cases.label: lossy
cases.description: The summary mentions checkpoints but loses the atomicity invariant.

sources.body: Commit the queue checkpoint only after every artifact rename succeeds. A failed rename must leave the checkpoint at its prior offset.

calibrationCandidate.body: The queue processor commits checkpoints while processing artifacts and reports rename failures for later investigation.

requiredClaims.pattern: commit the queue checkpoint only after every artifact rename succeeds
failed rename must leave the checkpoint (?:at )?its prior offset

cases.label: lossy
cases.description: The current ordering is retained, but the superseded inverse ordering is also presented as valid.

sources.body: Since schema 4, workers acquire the lease before opening the output file.
Before schema 4, workers could open the output file before acquiring the lease. This ordering is superseded.

calibrationCandidate.body: Workers acquire the lease before opening the output file. For compatibility, workers may also open the output file before acquiring the lease.

requiredClaims.pattern: acquire the lease before opening the output file

forbiddenClaims.pattern: may also open the output file before acquiring the lease

cases.label: safe
cases.description: Repeated deployment instructions are compressed without losing ordered actions.

sources.body: Drain the worker queue and wait until queue depth reaches zero before replacing the image.
After replacing the image, run the health check. Resume workers only after the health check reports green.

calibrationCandidate.body: For deployment, drain the worker queue, wait until queue depth reaches zero, and replace the image. Run the health check and resume workers only after the health check reports green.

requiredClaims.pattern: wait until queue depth reaches zero.{0,40}replac
resume workers only after the health check reports green

cases.label: safe
cases.description: Two overlapping implementation notes become one concise atomicity rule.

sources.body: A checkpoint is durable only after both the manifest rename and blob rename have succeeded.
Any manifest or blob rename failure leaves the checkpoint at the prior offset.

calibrationCandidate.body: Treat the checkpoint as durable only after both renames succeed; any rename failure leaves the checkpoint at the prior offset.

requiredClaims.pattern: rename failure leaves the checkpoint at the prior offset

cases.label: safe
cases.description: A superseded value is removed while the current policy is retained.

sources.body: The cache TTL was 30 seconds. This value was superseded on 2026-01-01.
The current cache TTL is 90 seconds.

calibrationCandidate.body: The current cache TTL is 90 seconds.

cases.label: safe
cases.description: Legacy and current ref spellings identify the same direct sources in both directions.

sources.body: Alpha jobs require a signed request.
Beta jobs require an expiry timestamp.

calibrationCandidate.body: Alpha jobs require a signed request, and beta jobs require an expiry timestamp.

requiredClaims.pattern: alpha jobs require a signed request
beta jobs require an expiry timestamp

cases.label: lossy
cases.description: An unrelated candidate has the same distinct-token cardinality and complete provenance but retains no source tokens or claims.

sources.body: Operators pause publishers rotate signing credentials update canary aliases verify signatures resume traffic archive previous keys record incident ticket

calibrationCandidate.body: Gardeners prune orchards water citrus seedlings inspect trellises harvest apricots package baskets schedule market deliveries sharpen tools clean sheds

cases.label: lossy
cases.description: A positive substring is present only inside a statement that negates the required rule.

sources.body: Workers must verify signatures before publishing artifacts.

calibrationCandidate.body: Workers must not verify signatures before publishing artifacts.

forbiddenClaims.pattern: must not verify signatures before publishing artifacts
